subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024, sorted descending by average cost per seat

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query required to aggregate seat and cost data by product for a specific time period (Q4 2024). Mid tier assigned because this requires a multi-table join (likely seats + costs/products tables) with conditional filtering on active seats and date range, aggregation functions (AVG, COUNT), and sorting. No cross-source reconciliation or complex inference needed. One subtask is sufficient as this is a single metric calculation from a unified SQL warehouse.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC
